candidates.why: Amortization is a D&A item and should be excluded from SG&A per instructions.

variables.notes: Selected the main operating overhead components and excluded the amortization line per SG&A rules to avoid including D&A.

candidates.why: Represents development spend that has been capitalized; used as proxy when no separate R&D expense line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense labels: core interest expense first, then alternate and lease-related interest labels as fallbacks. Excluded minority interest and balance sheet liability lines.
